articles.headline: Before quantum computing arrives, this startup wants enterprises already running on it
articles.deck: After selling his AI startup to AMD for $665 million, Peter Sarlin is back with QuTwo, a new venture building the infrastructure it believes enterprises will need when quantum computing finally arrives.
